full_text:
Zhu Ju (Zifan) 朱據 (子範)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhu Ju (朱據), styledZifan (子範), was born in Wu county, Wu commandery. Demoted after supporting Sun He. Tricked into committing suicide. Zhu Ju was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Zhu Ju lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
